title: Cozy Cauliflower Melt
description: A nutty, silky Ukrainian dish featuring crispy cauliflower florets topped with a creamy, egg-free cheese sauce.

ingredients.name: Heavy Cream
ingredients.notes: Cold, if possible to prevent curdling

ingredients.name: Nutritional Yeast
ingredients.notes: For a nuttier flavor and vegan option

ingredients.name: Pepper
ingredients.notes: For a touch of freshness and complexity

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F (218°C). Rinse cauliflower head under cold water, then dry thoroughly. Cut into florets.
In a large skillet or pan, melt butter over medium heat. Stir in flour until smooth and glossy; cook for about 1 minute.
Gradually add heavy cream, stirring constantly to avoid lumps. Simmer for about 3 minutes until sauce thickens slightly. Remove from heat.
Whisk in nutritional yeast, vegan milk or cream, salt, and pepper. Stir well until incorporated and the mixture is smooth. Allow it to cool slightly before using.
Spread cauliflower florets evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Drizzle lightly with cooled sauce mixture. Bake for about 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Sprinkle additional nutritional yeast on top of each serving for an extra boost in flavor and texture.
